title: Aneurysm Detector
description: Award-winning convolutional neural network using MaskRCNN to detect aortic aneurysms from video, with 3D visualization of results.

title: Data Governance Platform
description: Enterprise data governance solution for public sector initiatives, integrating Informatica, AWS, and Azure services.

title: Real-Time KPI Dashboards
description: Dynamic dashboards for monitoring business metrics and KPIs in real time, driving strategic decision-making at an insurance company.

title: Predictive Analytics Pipeline
